justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "today+14 at 2pm" as June 16th at 2 PM, and then correctly adjusted to June 17th with flexibility around 2 PM.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative dates and offered to check a broader time range when the initial request was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in a minimal number of turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear updates and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent seamlessly recovered from the initial unavailability by offering alternative dates and time ranges, maintaining full context of the user's request.
